[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0001111101 6
1 1011111011 8
2 0100011000 3
3 0011010010 4
4 0011101101 6
5 0000100001 2
6 0000110101 4
7 0011010011 5

01 0000010010 2
12 0011001100 4
23 0000000000 a
34 0000100100 2
45 0001000001 2
56 0000011100 3
67 1011100011 6
70 0100001000 2

02 0011010010 4 match 3
13 0011001000 3
24 0000100000 1
35 0000100001 2 match 5
46 0000010000 1
57 1010000110 4
60 1100100001 4
71 0100010000 2

03 0011000010 3
14 0000101100 3
25 0000100001 2 match 5
36 0000010100 2
47 0011000011 4
50 1100001100 4
61 1100000010 3
72 0100011000 3 match 2

04 0000000000 a
15 0001100001 3
26 0000000000 a

62 1111000010 5
73 0100001000 2

05 0001000000 1
